headline: Why Tortoise AI Infrastructure ETF (TCAI) Is One the Best AI ETFs
summary: Data centers used to top out at around 50 megawatts. The next wave of facilities will draw more than a gigawatt apiece, consuming more power than entire cities the size of San Francisco. That shift is rewiring the economics of utilities, optical networking vendors, and electrical contractors all at once, and it is the structural ... Why Tortoise AI Infrastructure ETF (TCAI) Is One the Best AI ETFs

headline: Vistra vs. Constellation: Which AI Power Stock Is the Better Buy Right Now?
summary: For retirement-focused investors weighing the two dominant independent power producers cashing in on the AI data center buildout, the question is direct: Vistra (NYSE:VST) or Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) — which one belongs in the portfolio right now? Both have ridden the same nuclear-and-gas thesis. Both have signed long-term hyperscaler contracts. But the answer for someone whose ... headline: Regulator Helps Constellation Energy Fast-Track Three Mile Island Revival

headline: Assessing Constellation Energy (CEG) Valuation After The Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance and business profile Constellation Energy (CEG) has drawn attention after a weak run for the stock, with the price down about 10% over the past month and around 17% over the past 3 months. The company produces and sells electricity, natural gas, and energy solutions across several U.S. regions. It has about 31,676 megawatts of nuclear, wind, solar, natural gas, and hydro capacity serving a wide mix of customers. On recent reported figures, Constellation Energy generated...
